response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with 15+ years across web, backend, and embedded systems, including recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js product work, React and MongoDB experience, AWS/CDK and Kubernetes exposure, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators). Strong software craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing-focused open source) align well with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are mostly stack-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Jest mention, though adjacent experience suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience with cloud (AWS) and Kubernetes exposure
Current, hands-on AI-agent development experience (MCP tooling, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong engineering-practices background: TDD, CI/CD, code review culture, testing tools authorship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python absent from the resume; Java experience appears dated
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named, though general testing depth likely compensates
